programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mule Deer
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to Tanzania
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: Best Deals with The French Glow
programme.desc: Deal expert The French Glow breaks down the latest and greatest deals, including some fun Mother's Day finds! Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: What I Eat in a Day with Kyle Richards
programme.desc: Find out what Kyle Richards eats in a day plus some of her go-to kitchen must-haves. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: What I Eat in a Day with Madison LeCroy
programme.desc: Follow Madison LeCroy's daily food journey from breakfast to dinner. Discover her favorite meals and healthy eating tips! Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Chef Inspired Kitchen Essentials with Tastemade
programme.desc: Explore chef-approved cookware, gadgets, and kitchen tools curated by Tastemade to elevate your home cooking experience. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar or scan the QR code!

programme.title: Shoppable Shorts: Kitchen Best Sellers with Angela Lauren
programme.desc: Angela Lauren shares the best selling kitchen items from Amazon.

programme.title: The Price of Winning
programme.desc: The 1987 Edmonton Oilers entered the Stanley Cup Finals as the greatest hockey team ever, boasting 7 future Hall of Famers and two Stanley Cups under their belt. The Philadelphia Flyers, on the other hand, entered the series with a rookie goalie as their only hope, playing like they had nothing to lose. What resulted from this matchup was one of the most iconic Game 7s in hockey history.

programme.title: The Euro Step
programme.desc: A generation of Europeans came to the NBA with skill and promise at the turn of the century, only to be thwarted by bigger, stronger competition stateside – that is, until Dirk Nowitzki took on the mighty Spurs in the 2006 playoffs.

programme.title: Next Year
programme.desc: It had been 108 years since the Chicago Cubs had last won the World Series. And now, after trailing 3-1 in the series, the Cubs were one game away from ending the drought. But against the Cleveland Indians – a franchise with their own long title drought – it would take everything the Cubs had and more to win Game 7 of the 2016 World Series.

programme.title: The Messiah Promised
programme.desc: After winning five Stanley Cups with the greatest dynasty in the history of modern hockey, Mark Messier risked his legacy to accomplish the impossible: winning in New York City.

programme.title: The Champion Playbook with Rob Gronkowski & Jason Tartick
programme.desc: Join childhood friends Rob Gronkowski and Jason Tartick as they share their ultimate game day essentials, from fitness gear to grooming must-haves and tailgating necessities. Get ready to elevate your sports experience with insider tips and product recommendations from real-life champions!

programme.title: Capítulo 94
programme.desc: Mia confides in Alma about Franco's change since his relationship with Valeria started. Nico thinks Lupita is after Karen's cousin.

programme.title: Capítulo 95
programme.desc: León reminds Paola that he did her a favor, and forbids her to ever see or go near Diego again. Mia accepts Giovanni's request to start dating.

programme.title: Capítulo 96
programme.desc: Everyone laughs when Giovanni reveals that him and Mia are dating. Joaquín faints in gym class after taking drugs; Esteban doesn't let the fellow classmates get help.

programme.title: Capítulo 97
programme.desc: Roberta ruins her dad's fancy dinner by embarrassing him and pretending he beats her. Mia plans to get evidence of Joaquín's drug business.

programme.title: Capítulo 98
programme.desc: Lupita finds Mia's diary in Nico's belongings, not knowing that Miguel is the one who took it. Franco tells Mia to ignore the rumours about her mother.

programme.title: Capítulo 99
programme.desc: Diego finds out about the ring Paola received from his father, León, and breaks up with her. Mia plans to get revenge on Miguel for reading her diary. Joaquín starts rehab.

programme.title: Capítulo 100
programme.desc: Mia asks Raquel to tell Miguel, when he's with Julieta or alone, that she is crazy for him. Paola confesses to Diego about her past.

programme.title: Capítulo 101
programme.desc: Mia learns the truth about her mom's past. After getting back with Paola, Diego hides her in the school.

programme.title: Capítulo 102
programme.desc: Giovanni gives his full support to Mia after she learns how her mother died. After talking to Valeria, Mia accepts the truth and the fact that her mom was a hoe.

programme.title: Capítulo 103
programme.desc: Roberta finds out about Diego and Paola dating. Mia runs away from school and goes to stay with Alma. Meanwhile, Miguel searches for Mia.

programme.title: Sexy calendario

programme.title: Rivero firma su sentencia
programme.desc: Dalvio cleans house. Carmen returns home. Ruti end things with Sebas. Rodrigo blackmails Teran into exposing Casillas. Esperanza quits the University. Tony seduces Monica. Omar asks Aurelio to kill Rivero. Aurelio tells him to stall.

programme.title: Rutila en la mira
programme.desc: Aurelio puts Isma and Dalvio to work on Rivero. Isma gets turned down by his married college advisor. Grenas locates Esperanza's car plates. Aurelio shares a night with Pilar. Filemon is on the hunt for Ruti.

programme.title: Enmudecen al informante
programme.desc: Aurelio proposes to Pilar but Eunice offends him. Rodrigo and Evelyn talk about their future. Grenas locates Rivero. Filemon attacks killing Sebas and wounding Ruti. Russians double-cross Eunice and Aurelio shoots them all down.

programme.title: Infeliz encuentro
programme.desc: Castillo informs Teran of Evelyn's escape. Juan Carlos demands Tony. Arabs agree to deal with Pilar. Paloma asks Omar for a divorce. Zoe buys Esperanza a gift. Aurelio is transporting the shipment via Cartel of the Suns.

programme.title: Escandalo a la vista
programme.desc: The family arranges Victor's final resting. Pilar and Felina move on the emerald and cocaine businesses in Spain. Aurelio settles tempers on the left and right in Colombia. Carla is making waves on her radio show.

programme.title: El presidente un sicario
programme.desc: Filemon continues to fail Tony. Juan Carlos seeks out Ruth. Aurelio meets the President in Caracas. Monica relocates to the US and re-affirms her deal with 30-30. Felina showcases the emeralds to Spain. Ismael finds the Maras holed up.

programme.title: Caller a un testigo
programme.desc: Venezuelan President asks Aurelio for a favor. The Defense is preparing a raid. Paloma returns to Los Pinos. Tony wants to avenge Ruben. Grenas mentions the sighting of Esperanza. Aurelio wants Skinny in Honduras. The shipment gets stopped.

programme.title: Mas de una baja
programme.desc: Penumbra gets the shipment released. Omar blackmails Jaime. Pilar gets ahead of herself and Feline doesn't trust the distributor. Aurelio kills Jobless and escapes DEA. Colon sees Tata from drone photos and pinpoints the ranch.

programme.title: Season 5
programme.desc: A humble man who wanted to become the most powerful man in the world of drug trafficking in Mexico.

programme.title: Morir antes que entregarse
programme.desc: Jaime poisons Paloma. Salazar and Colon are tracking movements along the shipping routes in Venezuela. Garcia is killed in the gun battle. Teran is suspicious of Castillo. Tony and Monica meet Ninon.

programme.title: Beso fallido
programme.desc: Luis invita a Silvia a ver una película a su casa, pero Pedro interrumpirá su romántico momento, pues quiere recuperar su tele. Por otra parte, Arturo jugará póker con Germán, Jorjais y Benito.

programme.title: Las pantuflas de Luis
programme.desc: Luis y Pedro hacen una apuesta para saber si se dice pantuflas o pantunflas y le preguntarán a todos los vecinos. Lorena sospecha que Benito está molesto por su nuevo galán.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La cosas de Don Roque
programme.desc: Germán le entrega a Vanessa cosas que le dejó don Roque, por lo que ambos lo recuerdan y homenajean. Lorena aprecia a Soledad, la nueva amiga de Benito.

programme.title: El tamalero
programme.desc: Como el tamalero no deja dormir a Luis, este le pedirá que le baje a su bocina. Ve cuántos enemigos se echará encima, por dejar sin trabajo al tamalero.

programme.title: Los paramédicos
programme.desc: Por pedirle a Morris que ponga en su tarea que son paramédicos, Rocko y Ale deben ir a la escuela a dar un curso de primeros auxilios. Llegan nuevos vecinos al departamento 301.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Los ex
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvita que deje de hablar con su ex, pues se siente incómodo, sin sospechar que Maru, ex de Luis, llegará a la puerta de su casa. Además, la obra de arte de Jorjais.

programme.title: El cumpleaños de Germán
programme.desc: Todos se olvidan del cumpleaños de Germán, a pesar de estar invitados a la fiesta. Lorena y Frankie le dicen a Benito que volverá a los castings.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: I'm Going Through But I'm Running Over
programme.desc: Don't lose heart. In I'm Going Through But I'm Running Over, Pastor Steven reveals that even though you may face adversity, God is with you - and He's making a way through.

programme.title: Forward Not Finished
programme.desc: In Forward Not Finished, Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that God is still writing our story - so don't give up believing Him for more.

programme.title: God's Up To Something Upstream
programme.desc: In God's Up To Something Upstream!, Pastor Steven reminds us that wherever we have a problem, God already has a plan.

programme.title: This Is What A Miracle Feels Like

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don't let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what's next.

programme.title: He Was The One
programme.desc: Assume that God is using you. In He Was The One, Pastor Steven teaches us that instead of judging our current season, we should trust that it is significant to where God is taking us next.

programme.title: Life After the Let Down
programme.desc: In Life After The Let-Down, we're reminded how powerful God's grace is - even after we've faced unmet expectations.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God's trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn't the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.
